content_fingerprint: openai ships codex rust sdk alpha update v0 125 0 openai has pushed a new alpha release of its rust based codex sdk tagged rust v0 125 0 alpha 3 to its public github repository the release appeared on the openai codex github repository on 24 april 2026 bearing the tag rust v0 125 0 alpha 3 and a timestamp of 11 36 utc unlike minor metadata edits this is classified as a genuine release level update meaning code or packaged artifacts were published to the repository the rust language tag in the version identifier signals this is part of openai s effort to provide first class rust bindings for de
